chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.778 of 2024 Fahim Abbas vs. The State Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 12.06.2024 Mr. Javed Ahmed Korai, Advocate for the Applicant Ms. Abida Parveen Channar, Special Prosecutor, ANF O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant was arrested on 14.02.2024 from Railway Cant Station, Karachi by Inspector, Shafique Ahmed Khan of Police Station ANF Clifton, Karachi and from him 4.800 kgs of weed was recovered, hence, he was booked in the present case. He is in jail since then and meanwhile challan has been submitted but still charge has not been framed. 2. The punishment of the offence, applicant has been booked is maximum 07 years and minimum 03 years. Hence the offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause under Section 497 Cr.PC. 3. On these facts and grounds applicant’s counsel has pleaded for bail opposed by learned Special Prosecutor, ANF, however, the grounds agitated, as above are attracted and the applicant has been able to make out the case to grant bail. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/ (Rupees one hundred thousand only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to be executed to the satisfaction of the trial Court. 4. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms; the findings made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE Rafiq P.A. 2
